steps.t: Ezôti has asked you to place flyers advertising his show all around the Upper Ward. But because Ezôti is terrible, do not do a good job. Place flyers …
Instead of distributing more flyers for Ezôti, you have decided to burn them in a fire. The open flame on the south-eastern corner of the Grand Market…
You have no more flyers left to place. Will Ezôti wonder how you accomplished the task so quickly? Probably not.
